case_title: LAURA GLORIA HINOJOSA VS. MARGARET ANNE FIVIAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HINOJOSA, LAURA GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT FIVIAN, MARGARET ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MANDALA EARLY LEARNING CHILD CARE CENTER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HINOJOSA, LAURA GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIVIAN, MARGARET ANNE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MANDALA EARLY LEARNING CHILD CARE CENTER $9,375.26 PRINCIPAL, $365.91 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,921.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
